sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 55:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 55:1
items.html: ZON are in two vessels in the first phase of the second expansion, called AB of AK. In the second phase of the second expansion, called SAG of AK, ZON are in one vessel. (Item 60)
